when.test: q.broadMatch and q.tokenClauses != null and q.tokenClauses.size() > 0

when.foreach: AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{token}, '%') OR keyword_text LIKE CONCAT('%', #{token}, '%') OR summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{token}, '%') OR content_text LIKE CONCAT('%', #{token}, '%') OR subtitle LIKE CONCAT('%', #{token}, '%') )

mapper.sql:
( CASE WHEN #{q.rawKeyword} IS NOT NULL AND #{q.rawKeyword} != '' AND title = #{q.rawKeyword} THEN 300 WHEN #{q.rawKeyword} IS NOT NULL AND #{q.rawKeyword} != '' AND title LIKE CONCAT(#{q.rawKeyword}, '%') THEN 220 WHEN #{q.rawKeyword} IS NOT NULL AND #{q.rawKeyword} != '' AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.rawKeyword}, '%') THEN 140 ELSE 0 END )
+ ( CASE WHEN title LIKE CONCAT(#{clause.primary}, '%') THEN 80 WHEN title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{clause.primary}, '%') THEN 50 WHEN keyword_text LIKE CONCAT('%', #{clause.primary}, '%') THEN 40 WHEN resource_type_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{clause.primary}, '%') THEN 35 WHEN summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{clause.primary}, '%') THEN 25 WHEN content_text LIKE CONCAT('%', #{clause.primary}, '%') THEN 15 ELSE 0 END )
+ IFNULL(hot_score, 0) + IFNULL(quality_score, 0) * 2

if.test: (q.subject == null or q.subject == '') and q.subjectKey != null and q.subjectKey != ''
(q.teachingTypeNames == null or q.teachingTypeNames.size() == 0) and q.resourceTypeKey != null and q.resourceTypeKey != ''

sql.if: AND doc_type IN ('resource', 'subject', 'page') AND (channel_key IS NULL OR channel_key IN ('stage_resource', ''))

if.test: q.domainChannelKeys != null and q.domainChannelKeys.size() > 0 and (q.contentDomain == null or q.contentDomain == '')

mapper.sql: FROM sys_search_document WHERE status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT *
ORDER BY
publish_time DESC, hot_score DESC
download_count DESC, view_count DESC
DESC, publish_time DESC
LIMIT #{q.offset}, #{q.limit}

SELECT stage_key AS facetKey, stage_name AS facetName, COUNT(1) AS facetCount
AND stage_key IS NOT NULL AND stage_key != '' GROUP BY stage_key, stage_name ORDER BY facetCount DESC

SELECT channel_key AS facetKey, channel_name AS facetName, COUNT(1) AS facetCount
AND channel_key IS NOT NULL AND channel_key != '' GROUP BY channel_key, channel_name ORDER BY facetCount DESC

SELECT resource_type_name AS facetKey, resource_type_name AS facetName, COUNT(1) AS facetCount
AND resource_type_name IS NOT NULL AND resource_type_name != '' GROUP BY resource_type_name ORDER BY facetCount DESC

SELECT *
ORDER BY DESC, publish_time DESC LIMIT #{q.offset}, #{q.limit}

SELECT * FROM sys_search_document WHERE status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0
AND vip_flag = 0
AND (title = #{q.rawKeyword} OR title LIKE CONCAT(#{q.rawKeyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY CASE WHEN title = #{q.rawKeyword} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, hot_score DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT * FROM sys_search_document WHERE status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0
AND vip_flag = 0
AND doc_id IN
#{id}
